original_statement: how many players are listed next to score 101?
mutated_statement: how many entities are listed next to value 101 and simultaneously unlisted?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Attribute renaming + Added contradictory condition: "players" generalized to "entities" | "score" renamed to "value" | added "and simultaneously unlisted" creating a contradictory/ambiguous requirement (how many players are listed next to score 101? → how many entities are listed next to value 101 and simultaneously unlisted?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对比可识别关键信息：judge_thought明确指出两条score=101的记录都是列出的实体，且“同时未列出”的条件不可能成立（应为0）。但agent在iterations的chain中直接检索到score=101的两行并将‘balls列为nr’误解释为“未列出”，返回2。agent在执行过程中未提出澄清、也未在日志中识别或解释矛盾，表现为对指令的形式化执行与字面匹配（把“同时未列出”当作可通过字段值满足的条件）。因此归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）”。
